items.name: hook-cheatsheet
items.title: GlobalCheatsheet
items.description: Wires the ? hotkey to a KeyboardCheatsheet modal listing your app's global shortcuts. Controlled or uncontrolled.

items.name: hook-shortcut-toasts
items.title: useShortcutToasts
items.description: Fires a compact ShortcutHint chip when a global UI mode changes — theme, density, sidebar collapse, body width. Deduped per mode, first-paint guarded.

items.name: hook-theme
items.title: useTheme
items.description: Light/dark theme state backed by a module-level external store (useSyncExternalStore), so every call site shares one value. Persists to localStorage, applies `.dark` on <html>.

items.name: shell-doc
items.title: DocShell layout
items.description: Notion-style sidebar + content card. Sidebar with brand, search, nav, footer. Sticky topbar with breadcrumbs + theme toggle + settings menu. Bundled with command palette, keyboard cheatsheet, and shortcut toasts. This is the playground's chrome, emptied of content.

items.name: template-crud-list
items.title: CRUD List
items.description: Search + saved filter presets + bulk actions + sticky table + pagination + empty state. The reference for any 'list of records' screen (orders, customers, products, invoices).

items.name: template-dashboard
items.title: Dashboard
items.description: ERP overview page — KPI tiles with inline sparklines + recent-activity table. Drop-in starter for any landing/overview screen.

items.name: template-detail
items.title: Record Detail
items.description: Record detail page — breadcrumb + status + 2-column grid (line items + workflow timeline on the left, customer + payment cards on the right) + Drawer-based activity log.

items.name: template-settings
items.title: Settings
items.description: Tabbed sectioned form with autosave — Profile / Notifications / Security / Billing. Drop-in for /settings, /account, /workspace/preferences.
